---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you proposing?

A clear description of the feature or component you'd like to see.

## Why is it needed?

What problem does it solve? What use case does it address?

## Possible implementation

If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here (optional).

## Examples

Links or screenshots of similar components in other libraries (optional).
